attractions.name: Dochula Pass
attractions.description: Popular tourist spot providing stunning 360 degree views of the Himalayas, home to 108 stupas built to celebrate victory and remember fallen soldiers

attractions.name: Punakha Dzong
attractions.description: One of the most beautiful sites in Bhutan, sitting at the fork of two rivers, second oldest and second largest fortress built in 1637, location of current king's royal wedding

attractions.name: Punakha Suspension Bridge
attractions.description: Longest suspension bridge in Bhutan with spectacular view of Po Chhu river and valley, ideal for photoshoots
